mapper.select: SELECT boss.*, subordinate.subordinate_id, employee.name FROM boss LEFT JOIN boss_subordinates ON boss.boss_id = subordinate.boss_id LEFT JOIN employee ON boss.employee_id = employee.employee_id WHERE boss.boss_id = #{bossId}
SELECT boss.*, subordinate.subordinate_id FROM boss LEFT JOIN boss_subordinates subordinate ON b.boss_id = subordinate.boss_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boss (employee_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE boss SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE boss_id = #{bossId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM boss_subordinates WHERE boss_id = #{bossId} AND subordinate_id = #{subordinateId}
